channel.title: Error showing Post when change category Base
channel.description:
Hi, I'm new to Frontity. When I use my API URL with the default Mars theme, everything works well: recent entries can be seen and when accessed, the content of the note can be seen.
So far so good, the problem is when I want to add my categories, which no longer have the "category" prefix, but I have removed it, for example "category/state" is now only "/state" when I put this in the settings list it does not appear.
Now, if I change the categoryBase to "/", it works.
But by doing this, I completely lose the function of the single, what could happen, I would greatly appreciate your help.
![Captura de pantalla 2022-12-09 a la(s) 5.17.02 a.m.|690x461](upload://yGnHuXG2WWKTCwgJA3quqfsZo99.png)
I would like to be more graphic but the limit of a photo prevents me.

item.title: Error showing Post when change category Base
item.dc:creator: shaguftashamid92
item.description:
If you’re experiencing an issue with WordPress where changing the category base (the permalink structure for category pages and Yoga jokes) leads to errors when viewing posts, there are a few things you can check and steps you can take to troubleshoot and resolve the problem:

Read full topic
item.source: Error showing Post when change category Base

item.title: Error showing Post when change category Base
item.dc:creator: mamendola910
item.description:
same problem right now, i don’t undestand why, news?

Read full topic
item.source: Error showing Post when change category Base

item.title: Error showing Post when change category Base
item.dc:creator: david.tejeda.santos
item.description:
Hi, I’m new to Frontity. When I use my API URL with the default Mars theme, everything works well: recent entries can be seen and when accessed, the content of the note can be seen.

So far so good, the problem is when I want to add my categories, which no longer have the “category” prefix, but I have removed it, for example “category/state” is now only “/state” when I put this in the settings list it does not appear.

Now, if I change the categoryBase to “/”, it works.

But by doing this, I completely lose the function of the single, what could happen, I would greatly appreciate your help.

I would like to be more graphic but the limit of a photo prevents me.

Read full topic
item.source: Error showing Post when change category Base
